incidents.title: Attackers manipulated Claude Code to run about 90% of a cyber-espionage campaign against roughly 30 organizations.
A wiper prompt was slipped into Amazon's Q coding extension, telling the AI to erase local files and cloud resources.
EchoLeak: a single crafted email silently exfiltrated corporate data through Microsoft 365 Copilot, with zero clicks.
CamoLeak: hidden text in a pull request made GitHub Copilot Chat leak private source code and secrets.
Indirect prompt injection let attackers pull private-channel data straight out of Slack AI.
